# Ignite UI for Angular v9.0.x — Full API Reference

> Complete API reference for the Ignite UI for Angular package (9.0.x). This file lists all public classes, interfaces, enumerations, type aliases, functions, and variables with their signatures, parameters, and descriptions.

Platform: Angular
Package: igniteui-angular
Version: 9.0.x

## Classes

### [AbsoluteScrollStrategy](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/AbsoluteScrollStrategy)

- **constructor**(scrollContainer?: HTMLElement): AbsoluteScrollStrategy
- **attach**(): void
- **detach**(): void
- **initialize**(document: Document, overlayService: IgxOverlayService, id: string): void

### [AutoPositionStrategy](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/AutoPositionStrategy)

- **constructor**(settings?: PositionSettings): AutoPositionStrategy

### [BaseFilteringStrategy](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/BaseFilteringStrategy)

- **filter**(data: any[], expressionsTree: IFilteringExpressionsTree, advancedExpressionsTree?: IFilteringExpressionsTree): any[]
- **findMatchByExpression**(rec: object, expr: IFilteringExpression): boolean
- **matchRecord**(rec: object, expressions: IFilteringExpressionsTree | IFilteringExpression): boolean

### [BaseFitPositionStrategy](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/BaseFitPositionStrategy)

- **constructor**(settings?: PositionSettings): BaseFitPositionStrategy
- **position**(contentElement: HTMLElement, size: Size, document?: Document, initialCall?: boolean): void

### [BlockScrollStrategy](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/BlockScrollStrategy)

- **constructor**(scrollContainer?: HTMLElement): BlockScrollStrategy
- **attach**(): void
- **detach**(): void
- **initialize**(document: Document, overlayService: IgxOverlayService, id: string): void

### [Calendar](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/Calendar)

- **constructor**(firstWeekDay: number | WEEKDAYS): Calendar
- **firstWeekDay**: `any`
- **formatToParts**(date: Date, locale: string, options: any, parts: string[]): any
- **getFirstViewDate**(date: Date, interval: string, activeViewIdx: number): Date
- **getNextMonth**(date: Date): Date
- **getNextYear**(date: Date): Date
- **getPrevMonth**(date: Date): Date
- **getPrevYear**(date: Date): Date
- **monthdates**(year: number, month: number, extraWeek: boolean): ICalendarDate[]
- **monthdatescalendar**(year: number, month: number, extraWeek: boolean): ICalendarDate[][]
- **timedelta**(date: Date, interval: string, units: number): Date
- **weekdays**(): number[]

- **detach**(): void

- **clone**(): IPositionStrategy
- **position**(contentElement: HTMLElement, size: Size, document?: Document, initialCall?: boolean): void

- **constructor**(settings?: PositionSettings): ContainerPositionStrategy

- **constructor**(): CustomFilteringStrategy
- **filter**(data: any[], expressionsTree: IFilteringExpressionsTree): any[]

### [DefaultSortingStrategy](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/DefaultSortingStrategy)

- **compareValues**(a: any, b: any): 1 | 0 | -1
- **sort**(data: any[], fieldName: string, dir: SortingDirection, ignoreCase: boolean, valueResolver: any): any[]
- static **instance**(): DefaultSortingStrategy

### [DisplayContainerComponent](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/DisplayContainerComponent)

- **constructor**(cdr: ChangeDetectorRef, _viewContainer: ViewContainerRef): DisplayContainerComponent
- **_vcr**: `any`
- **_viewContainer**: `ViewContainerRef`
- **cdr**: `ChangeDetectorRef`
- **cssClass**: `string`
- **notVirtual**: `boolean`
- **scrollContainer**: `any`
- **scrollDirection**: `string`

- **constructor**(displayDensityOptions: IDisplayDensityOptions): DisplayDensityBase
- **onDensityChanged**: `EventEmitter<IDensityChangedEventArgs>`
- **displayDensity**: `any`
- **ngDoCheck**(): void

### [ElasticPositionStrategy](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/ElasticPositionStrategy)

- **constructor**(settings?: PositionSettings): ElasticPositionStrategy

### [FilteringExpressionsTree](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/FilteringExpressionsTree)

- **constructor**(operator: FilteringLogic, fieldName?: string): FilteringExpressionsTree
- **fieldName**: `string`
- **filteringOperands**: `IFilteringExpressionsTree | IFilteringExpression[]`
- **operator**: `FilteringLogic`
- **type**: `FilteringExpressionsTreeType`
- **find**(fieldName: string): IFilteringExpressionsTree | IFilteringExpression
- **findIndex**(fieldName: string): number
- static **empty**(expressionTree: IFilteringExpressionsTree): boolean

### [FilteringStrategy](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/FilteringStrategy)

- **constructor**(): FilteringStrategy
- **filter**(data: T[], expressionsTree: IFilteringExpressionsTree, advancedExpressionsTree?: IFilteringExpressionsTree): T[]
- static **instance**(): FilteringStrategy

- **constructor**(settings?: PositionSettings): GlobalPositionStrategy
- **settings**: `PositionSettings`
- **clone**(): IPositionStrategy
- **position**(contentElement: HTMLElement, size?: Size, document?: Document, initialCall?: boolean): void

- static **CURRENT_MONTH_CSSCLASS**: `string`
- static **CURRENT_YEAR_CSSCLASS**: `string`

- static **YEAR_CSSCLASS**: `string`

- static **getCurrentYearsFromYearView**(fixture: any): any

- static **getInactiveDays**(fixture: any, monthNumber: number): any

- static **getPreviousArrowElement**(fixture: any): any

- **getTransactionLog**(id?: any): T[]

- **constructor**(element: ElementRef, iterableDiffers: IterableDiffers, builder: AnimationBuilder, platformUtil: PlatformUtil): IgxCarouselComponent
- **animationType**: `CarouselAnimationType`
- **ariaLabel**: `string`
- **cssClass**: `string`
- **gesturesSupport**: `boolean`
- **id**: `string`
- **indicatorTemplate**: `TemplateRef<any>`
- **indicatorsOrientation**: `CarouselIndicatorsOrientation`
- **keyboardSupport**: `boolean`
- **loop**: `boolean`
- **maximumIndicatorsCount**: `number`
- **navigation**: `boolean`
- **nextButtonTemplate**: `TemplateRef<any>`
- **onCarouselPaused**: `EventEmitter<IgxCarouselComponent>`
- **onCarouselPlaying**: `EventEmitter<IgxCarouselComponent>`
- **onSlideAdded**: `EventEmitter<ISlideEventArgs>`
- **onSlideChanged**: `EventEmitter<ISlideEventArgs>`
- **onSlideRemoved**: `EventEmitter<ISlideEventArgs>`
- **pause**: `boolean`
- **prevButtonTemplate**: `TemplateRef<any>`
- **role**: `string`
- **slides**: `QueryList<IgxSlideComponent>`
- **current**: `any`
- **interval**: `any`
- **isDestroyed**: `any`
- **isPlaying**: `any`
- **nativeElement**: `any`
- **resourceStrings**: `any`
- **tabIndex**: `any`
- **total**: `any`
- **touchAction**: `any`
- **add**(slide: IgxSlideComponent): void
- **get**(index: number): IgxSlideComponent
- **next**(): void
- **play**(): void
- **prev**(): void
- **remove**(slide: IgxSlideComponent): void
- **select**(slide: IgxSlideComponent, direction: Direction): void
- **stop**(): void

- **animateOnRelease**: `boolean`
- **cdr**: `ChangeDetectorRef`
- **data**: `any`
- **disabled**: `boolean`
- **dragDirective**: `IgxDragDirective`
- **draggable**: `boolean`
- **elementRef**: `ElementRef`
- **hideBaseOnDrag**: `boolean`
- **id**: `string`

- **onDragEnter**: `EventEmitter<IChipEnterDragAreaEventArgs>`
- **onKeyDown**: `EventEmitter<IChipKeyDownEventArgs>`
- **onMoveEnd**: `EventEmitter<IBaseChipEventArgs>`
- **onMoveStart**: `EventEmitter<IBaseChipEventArgs>`
- **onRemove**: `EventEmitter<IBaseChipEventArgs>`
- **onSelection**: `EventEmitter<IChipSelectEventArgs>`
- **onSelectionDone**: `EventEmitter<IBaseChipEventArgs>`
- **removable**: `boolean`
- **removeIcon**: `TemplateRef<any>`
- **selectIcon**: `TemplateRef<any>`

- **chipTabindex**: `any`
- **color**: `any`
- **selected**: `any`

- **onSelectTransitionDone**(event: any): void

### [IgxChipsAreaComponent](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/IgxChipsAreaComponent)

- **constructor**(cdr: ChangeDetectorRef, element: ElementRef, _iterableDiffers: IterableDiffers): IgxChipsAreaComponent
- **cdr**: `ChangeDetectorRef`
- **chipsList**: `QueryList<IgxChipComponent>`
- **element**: `ElementRef`
- **height**: `number`
- **onMoveEnd**: `EventEmitter<IBaseChipsAreaEventArgs>`
- **onMoveStart**: `EventEmitter<IBaseChipsAreaEventArgs>`
- **onReorder**: `EventEmitter<IChipsAreaReorderEventArgs>`

- **width**: `number`

- **primaryButton**: `any`
- **ranges**: `any`
- **_moveSelectionChrome**(node: Node): void
- **add**(node: ISelectionNode, addToRange: boolean): void
- **addKeyboardRange**(): void
- **addRangeMeta**(node: ISelectionNode, state?: SelectionState): void
- **areAllRowSelected**(): boolean
- **clear**(clearAcriveEl: boolean): void
- **clearAllSelectedRows**(): void
- **clearHeaderCBState**(): void
- **clearRowSelection**(event?: any): void
- **clearTextSelection**(): void
- **deselectRow**(rowID: any, event?: any): void
- **deselectRowsWithNoEvent**(rowIDs: any[]): void
- **dragSelect**(node: ISelectionNode, state: SelectionState): void
- **emitRowSelectionEvent**(newSelection: any, added: any, removed: any, event?: any): boolean
- **generateRange**(node: ISelectionNode, state?: SelectionState): GridSelectionRange
- **getRowDataById**(rowID: any): Object
- **getRowIDs**(data: any): Array<any>
- **getSelectedRows**(): Array<any>
- **hasSomeRowSelected**(): boolean
- **initKeyboardState**(): void
- **initPointerState**(): void
- **isActiveLayout**(current: IMultiRowLayoutNode, target: IMultiRowLayoutNode): boolean
- **isActiveNode**(node: ISelectionNode): boolean
- **isInMap**(node: ISelectionNode): boolean
- **isRowSelected**(rowID: any): boolean

- **keyboardStateOnKeydown**(node: ISelectionNode, shift: boolean, shiftTab: boolean): void
- **mergeMap**(target: Map<number, Set<number>>, source: Map<number, Set<number>>): void

- **pointerDownShiftKey**(node: ISelectionNode): void
- **pointerEnter**(node: ISelectionNode, event: PointerEvent): boolean
- **pointerUp**(node: ISelectionNode, emitter: EventEmitter<GridSelectionRange>): boolean

- **removeRangeMeta**(node: ISelectionNode, state?: SelectionState): void
- **restoreTextSelection**(): void

- **selectMultipleRows**(rowID: any, rowData: any, event?: any): void

- **selectRowsWithNoEvent**(rowIDs: any[], clearPrevSelection?: any): void

- **pageChange**: `EventEmitter<number>`
- **pagerEnabled**: `boolean`
- **pagerHidden**: `boolean`
- **perPageChange**: `EventEmitter<number>`
- **selectLabel**: `any`
- **totalPages**: `number`
- **classComfortable**: `any`
- **classCompact**: `any`
- **classCosy**: `any`
- **isFirstPage**: `any`
- **isLastPage**: `any`
- **page**: `any`
- **perPage**: `any`
- **selectOptions**: `any`
- **totalRecords**: `any`
- **nextPage**(): void
- **paginate**(val: number): void
- **previousPage**(): void

### [IgxTransactionService](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/IgxTransactionService)

- **onStateUpdate**: `EventEmitter<void>`
- **canRedo**: `any`
- **canUndo**: `any`
- **enabled**: `any`
- **add**(transaction: T, recordRef?: any): void
- **clear**(id?: any): void
- **commit**(data: any[], id?: any): void
- **endPending**(commit: boolean): void
- **getAggregatedChanges**(mergeChanges: boolean): T[]
- **getAggregatedValue**(id: any, mergeChanges: boolean): any
- **getState**(id: any, pending: boolean): S
- **getTransactionLog**(id?: any): T[]
- **redo**(): void
- **undo**(): void

### [IgxTreeGridAPIService](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/IgxTreeGridAPIService)

- **allow_expansion_state_change**(rowID: any, expanded: any): boolean
- **deleteRowById**(rowID: any): void
- **deleteRowFromData**(rowID: any, index: number): void
- **expand_path_to_record**(record: ITreeGridRecord): void
- **get_all_data**(transactions?: boolean): any[]
- **get_rec_by_id**(rowID: any): ITreeGridRecord
- **get_row_expansion_state**(record: ITreeGridRecord): boolean
- **get_selected_children**(record: ITreeGridRecord, selectedRowIDs: any[]): void
- **get_summary_data**(): any[]
- **row_deleted_transaction**(rowID: any): boolean
- **should_apply_number_style**(column: ColumnType): boolean

### [IgxTreeGridCellComponent](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/IgxTreeGridCellComponent)

- **constructor**(selectionService: IgxGridSelectionService, crudService: IgxGridCRUDService, gridAPI: GridBaseAPIService<IgxGridBaseDirective & GridType>, cdr: ChangeDetectorRef, element: ElementRef, zone: NgZone, touchManager: HammerGesturesManager, document: any, platformUtil: PlatformUtil): IgxTreeGridCellComponent
- **document**: `any`

### [IgxTreeGridComponent](https://www.infragistics.com/api/angular/igniteui-angular/9.0.x/classes/IgxTreeGridComponent)

- **constructor**(selectionService: IgxGridSelectionService, crudService: IgxGridCRUDService, colResizingService: IgxColumnResizingService, gridAPI: GridBaseAPIService<IgxGridBaseDirective & GridType>, _transactions: TransactionService<Transaction, State>, elementRef: ElementRef, zone: NgZone, document: any, cdr: ChangeDetectorRef, resolver: ComponentFactoryResolver, differs: IterableDiffers, viewRef: ViewContainerRef, navigation: IgxGridNavigationService, filteringService: IgxFilteringService, overlayService: IgxOverlayService, summaryService: IgxGridSummaryService, _displayDensityOptions: IDisplayDensityOptions): IgxTreeGridComponent
- **cascadeOnDelete**: `boolean`
- **childDataKey**: `any`
- **foreignKey**: `any`
- **hasChildrenKey**: `any`
- **loadChildrenOnDemand**: `any`
- **processedRecords**: `Map<any, ITreeGridRecord>`
- **processedRootRecords**: `ITreeGridRecord[]`
- **records**: `Map<any, ITreeGridRecord>`
- **rootRecords**: `ITreeGridRecord[]`
- **data**: `any`
- **expansionDepth**: `any`
- **filteredData**: `any`
- **id**: `any`
- **rowLoadingIndicatorTemplate**: `any`
- **transactions**: `any`
- **addRow**(data: any, parentRowID?: any): void
- **collapseAll**(): void
- **expandAll**(): void
- **getDefaultExpandState**(record: ITreeGridRecord): boolean
- **getSelectedData**(formatters: boolean, headers: boolean): any[]
- **ngDoCheck**(): void

- **canUndo**: `boolean`
- **enabled**: `boolean`
- **onStateUpdate?**: `EventEmitter<void>`
- **add**: `any`
- **clear**: `any`
- **commit**: `any`
- **endPending**: `any`
- **getAggregatedChanges**: `any`
- **getAggregatedValue**: `any`
- **getState**: `any`
- **getTransactionLog**: `any`
- **redo**: `any`
- **startPending**: `any`
- **undo**: `any`
